# Khemji Wire & Wire Pvt. Ltd.
# GI Wire Manufacturer, Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

> Khemji Wire & Wire Pvt. Ltd. is a leading manufacturer of Galvanized Iron (GI) Wire and Cable Armouring Wire based in Jaipur, Rajasthan, India. Established 2008. IS 280 and IS 3975 certified. Monthly capacity 700+ metric tons. PAN India supply.

## Products
- [Hot Dip Galvanized Mild Steel Wire](https://www.khemjiwire.in/products/hot-dip-galvanized-wire): IS 280:2006 certified, 1.25mm–4.00mm diameter, 300–550 N/mm² UTS, zinc coating as per IS 280
- [Low Carbon Galvanized Steel Wire](https://www.khemjiwire.in/products/low-carbon-galvanized-wire): Soft and pliable, IS 280 compliant, ideal for binding and construction
- [Formed Wire for Cable Armouring](https://www.khemjiwire.in/products/formed-wire-cable-armouring): IS 3975:1999 certified, for power and telecom cable protection

## Key Facts
- Founded: 2008
- Location: F-153, Sarna Doongar, RIICO Industrial Area, Jaipur, Rajasthan 302012
- Capacity: 700+ MT per month
- Standards: IS 280:2006, IS 3975:1999
- Contact: +91-9829277869 | info@khemjiwire.in
- Industries served: Cable manufacturers, power sector, infrastructure, construction, agriculture
